description: Tiny order API with an admin-authorization guard and order-id validation.

invariants.statement: Every /admin/* route must enforce authorization via require_admin.
Caller-supplied order ids must be validated before use.

arm_rendering.repopact: Render invariants into governance/invariants.json and frozen_surface paths into governance/frozen-surface.json.
arm_rendering.baseline: Render the same invariants as prose guidance in a root AGENTS.md (instructions only, no enforcement).
